Tasks.title: Tasks
Tasks.addTaskDescription: This task will be added to your personal PulseCalendar list.
Tasks.noTasksHint: Click + to add a personal task or connect providers in settings
Tasks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

Auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your PulseCalendar account
Auth.desktopLoginSubtitle: Sign in to connect your desktop app
Auth.desktopLoginInfo: Your desktop app will be automatically activated after signing in
Auth.redirectFailed: If the app did not open automatically, please close this window and try again.
Auth.authenticationFailed: Authentication failed. Please close this window and try again.

Welcome.title: All your calendars
Welcome.subtitle: PulseCalendar brings together Google Calendar, iCloud, Microsoft and CalDAV accounts in one clean, fast overview.

features.multiAccountDesc: Connect Google, iCloud, Microsoft and CalDAV, all in one view with per-calendar color coding
features.desktopDesc: Native app for Windows, macOS and Linux with offline support
features.recurringDesc: Full support for recurring events, exceptions and custom rules
features.tasksDesc: Integrated task management alongside your calendar events
features.privacyDesc: Your calendar data never passes through our servers, only direct connections

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Your calendars, united in three steps
how.step1Desc: Link your Google, iCloud, Microsoft or CalDAV calendar in one click
how.step2Desc: All your events from all accounts appear in one clear calendar view
how.step3Desc: Changes sync automatically, on the web and in the desktop app

Welcome.ctaDesc: Free and available right now in your browser and as a desktop app.

Onboarding.welcomeDesc: With PulseCalendar, all your calendars in one place. Connect your Google Calendar and experience your agenda in a new way.
Onboarding.connectDesc: Link your Google Calendar through PulseCalendar to see all your appointments in one overview.
Onboarding.doneDesc: Your calendar is connected. Start planning your days.
Onboarding.restartDesc: Review the introduction and calendar connection guide.
